text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It's show time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, shall we end this year<n>on a brilliant
note with dinner and an<n>opera?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Eve, and T.M. Opera<n>O has
reserved the academy's<n>cafeteria to throw a
party.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Only one reporter came to the<n>press
conference following my debut.<n>Still unthinkable
when I think back on<n>it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But it's the perfect device. You give<n>the
appearance of an empty house,<n>only for the show
to be revealed as a<n>sold-out hit at the last moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have kept you in suspense long<n>enough! Here I
am, the star of<n>today's event! Let the celebration
begin!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Silence...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Why are you the only one<n>present?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm here too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, um... Thank you for<n>everything this past
year...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And Doto?! This pattern is starting to<n>get stale...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Has my rise in popularity remained<n>stagnant the
entire time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, what a dark turn of events. Woe<n>is me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's shoulders sink. Well, this<n>lack of turnout
would get anyone<n>down.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How can I still be so unnoticed? The<n>true hero
Lohengrin stands before<n>them, and yet I get
nothing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why do their eyes not turn to this<n>knight of the
holy grail? Perhaps, they<n>are simply unaware? If
that is the<n>case...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I must dominate on the<n>racecourse, and
you must direct my<n>path!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The disappointment doesn't<n>discourage her in the
slightest. That's<n>what I call the heart of a top star.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... Opera O? There's, uh, a certain<n>reason
nobody came today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Maybe... I mean, at least I think it'sbecause everyone's... over there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Over there, as in... where?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone! Welcome to the New<n>Year's Eve
Umamusume Fan<n>Extravaganza!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: And we've got some big names with<n>us today!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
First, two powerhouses from the<n>recent Japan
Cup, El Condor Pasa<n>and Special Week!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, hello! Did ya see me knock out<n>the
competition?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I did my real best! I mean, I placed<n>third, but still...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Next up, two faces you can expect to<n>see in the
coming Arima Kinen, Grass<n>Wonder and Seiun
Sky!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Merry evening to ya.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! So, they had conspired to throw<n>another
event? Yes, now I see!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A show to celebrate those four of the<n>generation
before mine, the Golden<n>Generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fooled into thinking four is better than<n>one on
numbers alone, fans flocked<n>to that party instead.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Despite me having more appeal thanall of them combined.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait just a moment. If I were to<n>insert
myself into their gathering...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It would throw their plans off the rails,<n>but they
shall gain something much<n>grander. How
beneficial for everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is settled! I must go, for the greater<n>good—and to
fulfill my duty as a star!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Greetings, one and all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... Waaait! Don't interrupt<n>them... It won't
end well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It takes all the strength we can<n>muster, but
Meisho Doto and I get<n>Opera O to return.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, we have retreated to this castle of<n>silence,
hm?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those three on the other side have<n>records of
discernible achievement.<n>Naturally, they would
draw a crowd.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But lo! The main actor has only just<n>taken the
stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is high time they make notice of me.<n>I will help
correct their vision.
choice_data_list: Right, let's turn the tables next year.

text_block_list.text:
Of course, Trainer. Have you heard<n>the saying,
"Speak of next year, and<n>the devil will laugh"?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, before the devil has the chance,<n>I'll be the
one laughing instead! Next<n>year, this hall will be
packed to the<n>doors with my fans!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Aaaaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's way past dinner time.Hopefully the cafeteria is still open.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is that... laughter? But whose?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's... T.M. Opera O?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hard pass. I'll pretend I didn't see<n>anything...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Look at this, a fan in the flesh!<n>One of my
fans has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Tch! She saw me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, welcome! Eat, drink, and<n>enjoy my solo
show to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What's this? You're... Admire Vega.<n>You're of my
same generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You look absolutely dreadful. Come,<n>replenish
yourself with my charm.<n>There's plenty to go
around!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Save your breath, really...

And so, with a hapless Admire Vega<n>dragged
along, our final event of the<n>year comes to a cozy
finish.
